parent.policy_statement: Strategy 1: Empower a community of climate leaders.
parent.verbatim_text:
## CLIMATE SOLUTIONS: THE COLUMBUS WAY

## STRATEGIES

1. Empower a community of climate leaders
2.  Develop a clean energy economy
3.  Enhance partnerships for preparedness efforts
parent.extraction_rationale: Named strategy with numbered sub-actions (e.g., 1.1) that implement it.

subs.policy_statement: Incorporate climate action programs into GreenSpot by adapting GreenSpot outreach initiatives to increase climate change awareness, with targets of 200 training events and 1,000 new community partner signatory commitments by 2030.
subs.verbatim_text:
## INCORPORATE CLIMATE ACTION PROGRAMS INTO GREENSPOT 1.1

ADAPT GREENSPOT OUTREACH INITIATIVES TO INCREASE CLIMATE CHANGE AWARENESS TO RESIDENTS, BUSINESSES AND ORGANIZATIONS

## TARGETS

200 training events by 2030

1,000 new community partner signatory commitments by 2030
subs.parent_policy_name: Strategy 1: Empower a community of climate leaders.
subs.section_header: INCORPORATE CLIMATE ACTION PROGRAMS INTO GREENSPOT 1.1
subs.extraction_rationale: Specific outreach program action with quantified targets and timeline.

parent.policy_statement: Strategy 2: Develop a clean energy economy.
parent.verbatim_text:
## STRATEGIES

1. Empower a community of climate leaders
2.  Develop a clean energy economy
3.  Enhance partnerships for preparedness efforts
parent.extraction_rationale: Named strategy with multiple numbered sub-actions (2.1, 2.2).

subs.policy_statement: Support green business initiatives to spur job creation, targeting 10,000 new green jobs by 2030.
subs.verbatim_text:

| TARGETS                       |
|-------------------------------|
| 10,000 new green jobs by 2030 |
subs.parent_policy_name: Strategy 2: Develop a clean energy economy.
subs.extraction_rationale: Explicit job-creation program action with a quantified 2030 target.

subs.policy_statement: Increase annual sustainable development funding by establishing a green bank by 2025 and reaching $250 million average annual PACE investments by 2030.
subs.verbatim_text:
## INCREASE ANNUAL SUSTAINABLE DEVELOPMENT FUNDING 2.2

## TARGETS

Establish a green bank by 2025

$250 mil average annual PACE

investments by 2030
subs.parent_policy_name: Strategy 2: Develop a clean energy economy.
subs.extraction_rationale: Resource/finance mechanisms with clear establishment and investment targets and deadlines.

parent.policy_statement: Strategy 4: Support a healthy and resilient community.
parent.verbatim_text:
## SUSTAINABLE NEIGHBORHOODS

## STRATEGIES

4.  Support a healthy and resilient community
5.  Implement land use planning strategies for healthy ecosystems
6.  Prepare for warmer and wetter seasons

subs.policy_statement: Develop a regional adaptive management strategy with prioritized strategies outlined by 2025; implement short-term strategies by 2030; and implement long-term strategies by 2050.
subs.verbatim_text:
## DEVELOP A REGIONAL ADAPTIVE MANAGEMENT STRATEGY 3.1

| TARGETS                                 |
|-----------------------------------------|
| Prioritized strategies outlined by 2025 |
| Implement short-term strategies by 2030 |
| Implement long-term strategies by 2050  |
subs.parent_policy_name: Strategy 4: Support a healthy and resilient community.
subs.section_header: DEVELOP A REGIONAL ADAPTIVE MANAGEMENT STRATEGY 3.1
subs.extraction_rationale: Time-bound regional adaptation planning and implementation commitments.

subs.policy_statement: Conduct 'Ambition 2025' to outline a 7% increase to GHG modeling reduction by 2025 and implement reduction strategies by 2030 and long-term strategies by 2050.
subs.verbatim_text:
## AMBITION 2025 3.3

| TARGETS                                               |
|-------------------------------------------------------|
| Outline 7% increase to GHG modeling reduction by 2025 |
| Implement reduction strategies by 2030                |
| Implement long-term strategies by 2050                |
subs.parent_policy_name: Strategy 4: Support a healthy and resilient community.
subs.extraction_rationale: Defined process/action with quantified near-term (7%) and implementation timelines.

subs.policy_statement: Establish a coordinated network of resilience hubs by developing an implementation plan for priority locations by 2025 and implementing resilience hubs within a 15-minute walk for all residents by 2050.
subs.verbatim_text:
## ESTABLISH COORDINATED NETWORK OF RESILIENCE HUBS 4.1

## TARGETS

Develop an implementation plan for priority resilience hub locations by 2025

Implement resilience hubs within a 15 min walk for all residents by 2050
subs.parent_policy_name: Strategy 4: Support a healthy and resilient community.
subs.section_header: ESTABLISH COORDINATED NETWORK OF RESILIENCE HUBS 4.1
subs.extraction_rationale: Concrete adaptation infrastructure/service action with explicit timelines and coverage target.

subs.policy_statement: Establish a regional emergency alert system for climate hazards by 2025.
subs.verbatim_text:
## ESTABLISH REGIONAL EMERGENCY ALERT SYSTEM FOR CLIMATE HAZARDS 4.2

## TARGETS

Implement a regional alert system for climate hazards by 2025
subs.parent_policy_name: Strategy 4: Support a healthy and resilient community.
subs.section_header: ESTABLISH REGIONAL EMERGENCY ALERT SYSTEM FOR CLIMATE HAZARDS 4.2
subs.extraction_rationale: Specific public-safety/communication system commitment with a deadline.

subs.policy_statement: Increase development density by establishing vacant property redevelopment targets by 2025 and ensuring 40% of new housing is within 1/4 mile of employment centers by 2030 and 60% by 2050.
subs.verbatim_text:
## INCREASE DEVELOPMENT DENSITY 5.1

## TARGETS

Establish vacant property redevelopment targets by 2025

40% of new housing is within 1/4 mile of employment centers by 2030

60% of new housing is within 1/4 mile of employment centers by 2050
subs.parent_policy_name: Strategy 4: Support a healthy and resilient community.
subs.extraction_rationale: Land-use planning action with quantified housing-location targets and timelines.

subs.policy_statement: Increase equitable access to green space by tracking and expanding to 430 accessible green spaces by 2030, 500 by 2050, and ensuring access to green space within a 10-minute walk for all residents by 2050.
subs.verbatim_text:
## INCREASE EQUITABLE ACCESS TO GREEN SPACE 5.3

| TARGETS                                                              |
|----------------------------------------------------------------------|
| 430 accessible green spaces by 2030                                  |
| 500 accessible green spaces by 2050                                  |
| Access to green space within a 10 min walk for all residents by 2050 |
subs.parent_policy_name: Strategy 4: Support a healthy and resilient community.
subs.section_header: INCREASE EQUITABLE ACCESS TO GREEN SPACE 5.3
subs.extraction_rationale: Specific access/greenspace expansion targets with deadlines.

subs.policy_statement: Implement water adaptation strategies by implementing short-term Sustaining Scioto strategies by 2025 and completing mid-term strategies by 2050.
subs.verbatim_text:
## IMPLEMENT WATER ADAPTATION STRATEGIES 5.4

## TARGETS

Implement short-term Sustaining Scioto strategies by 2025

Complete mid-term Sustaining Scioto strategies by 2050
subs.parent_policy_name: Strategy 4: Support a healthy and resilient community.
subs.extraction_rationale: Time-bound commitment to implement specified adaptation strategies.

subs.policy_statement: Assess and protect assets from climate change impacts by completing a physical vulnerability assessment by 2025 and implementing short-term actions by 2030 and long-term actions by 2050.
subs.verbatim_text:
## ASSESS AND PROTECT ASSETS FROM THE IMPACTS OF CLIMATE CHANGE 6.1

## TARGETS

Complete physical vulnerability assessment by 2025

Implement short-term assessment actions by 2030

Implement long-term assessment actions by 2050
subs.parent_policy_name: Strategy 4: Support a healthy and resilient community.
subs.section_header: ASSESS AND PROTECT ASSETS FROM THE IMPACTS OF CLIMATE CHANGE 6.1
subs.extraction_rationale: Defined assessment and follow-on implementation with explicit timelines.

subs.policy_statement: Reduce urban heat with tree canopy cover by investing in equitable canopy across all neighborhoods by 2030, stopping net tree canopy losses by 2030, and reaching 40% city-wide tree canopy by 2050.
subs.verbatim_text:
## REDUCE URBAN HEAT WITH TREE CANOPY COVER 6.2

| TARGETS                                                     |
|-------------------------------------------------------------|
| Invest in equitable canopy across all neighborhoods by 2030 |
| Stop tree canopy net losses by 2030                         |
| 40% city-wide tree canopy by 2050                           |
subs.parent_policy_name: Strategy 4: Support a healthy and resilient community.
subs.section_header: REDUCE URBAN HEAT WITH TREE CANOPY COVER 6.2
subs.extraction_rationale: Quantified urban forestry targets with deadlines, linked to equity.

subs.policy_statement: Evaluate microgrid and energy storage projects by completing a prioritization study by 2025 and implementing 5 microgrid pilot projects by 2030.
subs.verbatim_text:
## EVALUATE MICROGRID + STORAGE PROJECTS 6.3

## TARGETS

Complete a microgrid and energy storage prioritization study by 2025

Implement 5 microgrid pilot projects by 2030
subs.parent_policy_name: Strategy 4: Support a healthy and resilient community.
subs.extraction_rationale: Specific grid resilience/clean-energy enabling action with study and pilot targets.

200 MW municipal installed by 2030

## WASTE

## STRATEGIES

12.  Reduce waste generated
13.  Increase waste diversion rate

90% reduction in organic waste by 2050

## REDUCE RECYCLABLE WASTE SENT TO THE LANDFILL 12.2

40% reduction in recyclable waste landfilled by 2030

95% reduction in recyclable waste landfilled by 2050

subs.extraction_rationale: Quantified recycling diversion target (reduction in recyclables landfilled) with deadlines.

subs.extraction_rationale: Specific circular economy support action with quantified job and organizational growth targets.

by 2030

100% LED streetlights by 2030

subs.policy_statement: Increase water efficiency to achieve 5% residential and commercial water use reduction and 10% municipal reduction by 2030, and 20% community-wide water use reduction by 2050.

subs.policy_statement: Prototype zero carbon buildings by adopting municipal zero carbon design standards by 2025, completing 4 municipal zero carbon pilot buildings by 2030, and adopting zero carbon design standards by 2050.

## TARGETS

subs.parent_policy_name: Adopt net zero and resilient building standards

subs.policy_statement: Adopt resilient building standards by developing and piloting a resilient design checklist by 2025 and refining it for an official roll-out by 2030.
subs.verbatim_text:
## ADOPT RESILIENT STANDARDS 9.2

## TARGETS

Develop and pilot resilient design checklist

by 2025

Continued follow up with pilot projects and updates to flood maps and climate predictions should be used to refine the checklist for an official roll-out by 2030.
subs.parent_policy_name: Adopt net zero and resilient building standards
subs.extraction_rationale: Concrete deliverable (checklist) with pilot deadline and stated rollout timeline.

individual.policy_statement: Commit to making Columbus carbon neutral by 2050.
individual.verbatim_text: In 2020, I put forth the vital goal of becoming a carbon neutral Columbus by 2050, ensuring that we do our part to combat global climate change.
individual.extraction_rationale: Citywide quantified target with a deadline (carbon neutral by 2050).

individual.policy_statement: Implement Clean Energy Columbus, a 100% clean energy community choice aggregation initiative supplying residents with Ohio-based wind and solar.
individual.verbatim_text: We implemented Clean Energy Columbus, our city's 100% clean energy aggregation initiative, ahead of schedule. Residents are already receiving energy from Ohio-based wind and solar sources - a tremendous leap toward achieving our 2050 carbon neutrality goal.
individual.extraction_rationale: Named program with an implemented intervention (100% clean energy aggregation).

individual.policy_statement: Adopt and implement an Energy and Water Transparency Benchmarking Ordinance and establish a 100% Ohio-based clean energy Community Choice Aggregation program.
individual.verbatim_text: Sustainable Columbus was able to pass the first Energy and Water Transparency Benchmarking Ordinance in Ohio and pass a ballot measure with nearly 80% approval of residents for a 100% Ohio-based clean energy Community Choice Aggregation (CCA). These strong regulatory measures will contribute significantly to GHG reduction in the energy sectors.
individual.extraction_rationale: Explicit ordinance/regulatory measure and a voter-approved CCA program with clear clean-energy specification.

individual.policy_statement: Achieve greenhouse gas emissions reductions of 45% by 2030 and 100% (carbon neutrality) by 2050 under CAP Actions (relative to the 2013 baseline).
individual.verbatim_text:
| PROJECTED GHG EMISSION CHANGES   | 2030   | 2050 |
| CAP Actions                      | -45%   | -100% |
individual.extraction_rationale: Quantified emissions reduction targets presented as the CAP Actions scenario outcomes.

individual.policy_statement: Create a public-facing system/dashboard and conduct annual reporting to track progress on CAP action targets and annual GHG inventory inputs.
individual.verbatim_text:
Annual reporting on key metrics for the targets of each action; and inputs for each annual GHG inventory will be due at the end of each calendar year.

Sustainable Columbus will implement a system and dashboard to demonstrate progress to the community for each action in relation to the targets outlined in the CAP.
individual.extraction_rationale: Explicit commitment to monitoring/reporting mechanisms (annual reporting; implement dashboard system).
